name: RentCast API
what_it_does: Developer-friendly rental market data API providing rent estimates, property records, market statistics, and comparable properties for any US address. Built for landlords, investors, and PropTech developers.
use_cases: Getting rent estimates for any US address to inform pricing decisions
Pulling comparable rental properties (comps) for market analysis agents
Accessing property records including ownership, characteristics, and history
Building rental market reports and dashboards for property investors
Automating rental price optimization with real-time market data
not_for: Sale (non-rental) price estimation (focused on rentals, not purchase prices)
MLS-level listing data with full details
Real-time available listings (market data, not active listings)
best_when: An agent needs rental market data and rent estimates for US properties, especially for landlords, property managers, or rental investment analysis.
avoid_when: You need for-sale property data, full MLS listings, or non-US market data.

auth.notes: Simple API key passed via X-Api-Key header. No OAuth required. Developer-friendly authentication — easy for agent integration.

pricing.paid_tiers: Starter $29/month (500 calls), Growth $49/month (1500 calls), Pro $89/month (5000 calls)
pricing.notes: Transparent, affordable pricing with clear call limits. Free tier is useful for prototyping. Significantly more accessible than Zillow or traditional MLS data vendors.

performance.rate_limits: Monthly call limits by tier; no per-minute throttling documented

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Clean REST API with standard HTTP status codes. Error responses include message field. Documentation uses ReadMe platform and is well-maintained. Error messages are clear and actionable.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: All endpoints are read-only GET requests — fully idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: Monthly call limits (not per-minute) — agents must track cumulative usage across the billing cycle
Address standardization required — inconsistent address formats return no results
Rent estimates are statistical models with uncertainty — not guaranteed accuracy
Property records availability varies by county/state — some areas have incomplete data
No webhooks — agents must poll for market changes
